name: Harvest Medley
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut eggplant into 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Place the cubed eggplant in a microwaveable dish and cook on high for 2 minutes.
3. Spray a rice cooker with nonstick spray.
4. In a measuring cup, pour the juice from the tomatoes. Add enough water to make 1 1/3 cups of liquid.
5. Pour the liquid into the rice cooker and add the eggplant and all remaining ingredients.
6. Cover and cook until the rice cooker turns off, about 20 minutes.
